Gedimo nustatymas (netaikomas jei atliek: Fault diagnosis (not applicable if repair is performed)

Operating system restoration/reinstallation with data backup (the client must provide the licenses of the desired programs to be installed)
Kompiuterio aušinimo sistemos valymas (k: Cleaning of computer cooling system (computer is not disassembled, manufacturer has provided easy access to the cooling system)
Kompiuterio aušinimo sistemos pilnas val: Full cleaning of computer cooling system (when the whole computer is disassembled, thermal paste is replaced, and the cooler is cleaned and lubricated)
Užpilto nešiojamo kompiuterio valymas (b: Cleaning of spilled on laptop (without replacement of parts)
Užpilto nešiojamo kompiuterio remontas (: Repair of spilled on laptop (parts price not included)

static.section4_about_us_body: For over 20 years, we have been offering quality computer repair services and sales of used computers and their components to the residents of Vilnius. During this significant period, we have fixed highly complex computer hardware and software issues. Whenever necessary, we always offer alternatives. Contact us, and we will do everything we can!
static.section5_title_malware: What are some simple tips to protect your computer from malware?
static.section5_malware_body: One of the solutions that will help ensure proper maintenance of your device is to update the computer's software. Regular updates of the operating system and other programs will help you avoid viruses and other malware and prevent unwanted breaches.
static.section5_title_overload: How not to overload the computer?
static.section5_overload_body: Regularly clean up unnecessary files - this is another tip to follow if you want your computer to last. We are used to cleaning our homes - getting rid of things we no longer need, but we should not forget to do the same with our computer. So, regularly review the files on your computer and delete the ones you no longer use.
static.section5_title_power_grid: Is it dangerous to keep a laptop plugged into the power grid all the time?
static.section5_body_power_grid: It is also important how you charge your laptop. It is worth noting that many laptop owners think that the device can always be plugged into the power outlet. It should be added that such an action will not have a negative impact on the operation of the device, but if you want to ensure the best result, then you should act a little differently: charge the computer early in the morning, and as soon as you notice that the battery is fully charged, stop charging.
static.section5_title_cleaning?: Is it worth cleaning the computer?
static.section5_body_cleaning: Another tip that is also worth following is that it is necessary to clean not only the keyboard of the device (this is how a large part of users behave). If you want your computer to work flawlessly for as long as possible, then do not forget to properly clean the connectors and the cooling system.
static.section5_title_clean_display: Is it worth cleaning the display?
static.section5_body_clean_display: It is also important to clean the display of the device. It is worth noting that the display of the device should be cleaned with a special cloth, which is designed for this purpose. It is also worth noting that the display should be cleaned regularly, as this will help to avoid the appearance of various stains on it.
static.section5_title_ventilated_room: Why should the computer be in a well-ventilated room?
static.section5_body_ventilated_room: The computer must be kept in such a way that the air intake is not blocked, otherwise the air flow will be suppressed and the computer will be damaged. It is advisable to periodically clean the computer both outside and inside. It is also worth noting that the computer should be kept in a well-ventilated room, as this will help to avoid overheating of the device.
static.section5_closing: We hope that these tips will help you properly maintain your computer and ensure its long and smooth operation. If you need computer repair in Vilnius, choose KOMPSERVISAS. We provide professional computer repair and other hardware solutions.
